## Summary
A short description of the feature request.

## Problem
What problem are you trying to solve?

What would you like ClipVault to do?

## Alternatives considered
Have you considered any other approaches or workarounds?

Explain why this would be useful.

## Additional context
Add screenshots, mockups, examples, or anything else here.
